questionHtml:
When does DNA replication occur?

A. S phase of interphase

B. Early prophase

C. G phase of interphase

D. Late prophase

meta.title: When does DNA replication occur? A. S phase of interphase B. Early prophase C. G phase of interphase D. Late prophase
